name: skill
description: A collection of independently installable Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: github-workflow
plugins.description: Start/finish GitHub Issue-based work sessions backed by a Project (v2) board: worktree-isolated branches, dependency gating, PR creation, and status transitions.

plugins.name: gh-triage
plugins.description: Triage GitHub Backlog issues — promote ready ones, enhance with code exploration, split clear sub-items, or ask for clarification.

plugins.name: gh-pr-reply
plugins.description: Fetch a GitHub PR's review comments (humans + bots), apply valid fixes, and reply to every thread.

plugins.name: gh-pr-approve
plugins.description: Review a colleague's GitHub PR, then approve it or request changes and file follow-up issues.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: Install a Claude Code statusline (model, cwd/branch, context usage, session token totals) into a fresh environment.

plugins.name: skill-optimizer
plugins.description: Slim and restructure a SKILL.md without losing behavior, trigger coverage, anchors, or facts.
